purpose: Bridge MFCS phases, breath stations, guardian mediation, and continuity checks.

mappings.primary_function: Frame the next cycle and open the problem surface.
mappings.continuity_check: No undefined entry; cycle begins from a valid frame.
No phase skip; option growth remains bounded.

mappings.primary_function: Validate and select the coherent candidate.
mappings.continuity_check: No rollback into Generate without explicit abort or reset.

mappings.primary_function: Commit the selected transition or operator move.
mappings.continuity_check: Committed action preserves phi-safety and traceability.

mappings.primary_function: Clear latches, archive trace, and re-enter Define.
mappings.continuity_check: Cycle closure achieved without illegal backward jumps.

guardian_roles.use_in_bridge: Guards Define -> Generate and any invocation boundary.
Aligns MFCS cadence with SABR / lattice timing.
Confirms AlwaysPhi only after consensus and seal.

operator_formula.working_interpretation: If the system remains approximately recurrent and no rollback occurs, phi-safety must hold globally.
operator_formula.implementation_note: Treat this as a bridge invariant to be checked against traces, not as a replacement for canonical MFCS or Fusion proofs.
